1702850.name: Desperate Survival
1702850.description:
Desperate Survival is an Action Survival Game with Rogue-Lite Elements in a 3D Voxel World.
Unlock and Select a variety of Characters with different weapons.
Fight your way trough 4+ Maps and Desperatly Survive until Dawn
Every Day they grow Stronger in Numbers and condition.

Features:

  • 4 Different Characters with their own Weapons and Gameplay Mechanics
  • Weapon Upgrades for Different Builds
  • 30 Minute Fights against Hordes of Monsters
  • Rogue-Lite system to Progress every Playthrough
  • Cute but Dystopian Atmosphere
1702850.supported_languages:
英语*, 德语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
